attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.CUSTOMER_MAPPING_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.PERSON_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.START_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.END_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.CSR_EMAIL_ADDRESS, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP,
 (
 select CUSTOMER_MAPPING_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP
 minus
 select CUSTOMER_MAPPING_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CUSTOMER_MAPPING_ID = STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.CUSTOMER_MAPPING_ID  and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPP.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXGCO_CUSTOMER_MAPPINGS)
